allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "node_modules\\.bin\\next dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\next-dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\next-dev-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\next-dev.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3"; npx next dev --port 3001 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 14; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3"; npx next dev --port 3001 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 16; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -Last 10; $job | Out-Null)

PowerShell($routes = @\("/", "/about", "/projects", "/experience", "/skills", "/contact", "/blog", "/resume", "/uses", "/projects/studiopro", "/projects/ecommerce-website", "/projects/cinevault", "/not-a-page"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "$\($res.StatusCode\)  OK  $r" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Host "$code  --  $r" } })

PowerShell($svc = Get-Service -Name "MongoDB" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($svc\) { Write-Host "MongoDB service: $\($svc.Status\)" } else { Write-Host "MongoDB service not registered — checking process..."; Get-Process -Name "mongod" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU })

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3\\server"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c", "npm run dev" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Portfolio_V3\\server" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $res = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $res.Content } catch { "Not up yet" }; Write-Host $res)

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Portfolio_V3\\server"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c", "npm run dev" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Portfolio_V3\\server" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $res = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5001/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content } catch { "DOWN: $_" }; Write-Host $res)
